overview.description: The Janus Henderson Corporate Bond ETF (JLQD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively invests in USD-denominated corporate bonds and commercial paper across various credit qualities and maturities. The fund selects investments through a combination of bottom-up fundamental analysis and top-down macroeconomic evaluation. JLQD was launched on Sep 8, 2021 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
